title: Run computational checks before inferential — lint/test before LLM review
description: Run computational checks (lint/test) before inferential checks (LLM review). Never waste LLM tokens reviewing code with syntax errors. Enforce ordering: lint → test → pass → then code review.
proposed_text: - Run lint/test before requesting code review — computational checks (lint, type-check, test) must pass before LLM-based review. Never waste review cycles on code with syntax errors
